---
title: "Alice Maud Budd"
---

## Alice Maud Budd

**Dates:** (b.1850)

### Description

member of the Gosling society

### Biography

Maude Budd was a Gosling in 1869, her address the Manor House, Clifton.  She was probably Alice Maud Budd (b.1850) daughter of the epidemiologist William Budd (1811-1880), of that address, and Caroline Mary Hilton (d. 1887). [Mrs Budd\'s will; ODNB; <i>Black\'s Medical Dictionary</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 3d [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
